slides.title: Mianakanyo ya Rixaka eku Heleni ka Malembe-xidzana ya Vu-19 na Vu-20
slides.lead: Ndlela leyi vaEuropa va vumbeke sayense ya mavunwa ya 'rixaka', na ndlela leyi mianakanyo yoleyo yi hundzuriweke swinawu, timfumo letikulu na, eku heteleleni, ku dlaya rixaka hinkwaro (genocide).

media.alt: Xikalo xa ku pima (callipers) ehenhla ka xifaniso xa munhu, xi fanekisela sayense ya mavunwa ya ku pima rixaka.

slides.notes: Sungula hi ku veka erivaleni mhaka-nkulu ya nhloko-mhaka hinkwayo: 'rixaka' a hi ntiyiso wa vutomi (biology) kambe i mianakanyo ya vaaki na ya tipolitiki leyi vumbiweke hi vanhu, ngopfu-ngopfu ku seketela matimba na ku nga ringani. Kombisa risima ku suka eku sunguleni ka dyondzo ku ya emahlweni - ku avanyisa hi mintlawa, kutani sayense ya mavunwa (Social Darwinism, eugenics), kutani mapholisi na madzolonga (ku dlaya rixaka hi vukoloni, Nazi Germany, na vuxaka na Afrika-Dzonga). Sungula xivutiso xa xiyenge xa FET xa nxopaxopo: xana mianakanyo yi hundzuka njhani vuyelo?

slides.title: Hi vula yini hi 'rixaka'?
slides.lead: Sayense ya manguva lawa yi pfumelelana leswaku a ku na xisekelo xa vutomi (biology) xo avanyisa vanhu hi 'tirixaka' to hambana.

blocks.text: **Rixaka** i ndlela yo hlengeleta vanhu hi swikombiso swa miri swo fana ni muhlovo wa nhlonge. Swi vonaka onge i ntumbuluko, kambe i **xivumbeko xa vaaki** - mianakanyo leyi vumbiweke hi vaaki, ku nga ri ntiyiso lowu kumekaka eka biology. Vanhu va avelana ku tlula 99.9% wa DNA ya vona, naswona ku ni ku hambana ka tijini (genetic) lokukulu *endzeni* ka ntlawa wihi na wihi lowu vuriwaka wa rixaka ku tlula *exikarhi* ka mintlawa.

items: **Racism** (ku xanisa hi rixaka) i ku pfumela leswaku mintlawa leyi yi nga vekiwa hi switulu, leyin'wana yi 'tlakukile' ku tlula leyin'wana.
Hi va-1800, vaEuropa va ambexe ku pfumela loku hi ririmi ra sayense.
Racism leyi ya 'sayense' yi tirhisiwile ku seketela vuhlonga, timfumo letikulu na, endzhaku, ku dlaya vanhu vo tala.

slides.notes: Hambanisa hi ku kongoma marito manharhu lawa vadyondzi va nga faneriki ku ma pfanganisa: rixaka (ntlawa), racism (sisiteme ya ku pfumela ya ku vekiwa hi switulu), na racism ya sayense/sayense-mavunwa (ku ringeta ku kombisa ku vekiwa koloko hi sayense). Kandziyisa leswaku ku vitana rixaka 'xivumbeko xa vaaki' a swi vuli leswaku racism i ya miehleketo ntsena - vuyelo bya yona i bya ntiyiso hi ndlela ya tihanyi. Veka xivangelo lexi endleke leswaku sayense yi tsakeriwa hi mintlawa ya matimba: yi endle ku nga ringani ku vonaka onge i ntumbuluko ku ri na ku va nhlawulo.

slides.eyebrow: Masungulo ya Enlightenment - malembe-xidzana ya vu-18
slides.title: Ku avanyisa vumunhu hi mintlawa
slides.lead: Vativi va ntumbuluko va le Europe va sungule ku hlela vanhu hi mixaka leyi tsimbiweke - naswona hi xihundla va va veka hi switulu.

blocks.text: Hi nkarhi wa Enlightenment, vativi va sayense va ringete ku avanyisa swilo hinkwaswo leswi hanyaka. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) na **Johann Blumenbach** (1795) va avanyise vanhu hi 'mixaka' yi nga ri mingani hi ku ya hi muhlovo wa nhlonge na xivumbeko xa nhloko (skull). Blumenbach u vumbe rito *Caucasian* naswona, xa nkoka, u vekile vaEuropa ehenhla ka pulani yakwe.

items: Ku avanyisa a ku vonaka ku nga yi tlhelo, kambe a ku aka **xiyimo xa switulu** laha vaEuropa a va ri xikombiso xo hetiseka.
Mintlawa leyi yi vumbiwe hi nkarhi wa vuhlonga na timfumo letikulu leti a ti andza.
Vaanakanyi va endzhaku va khome mixaka leyi yi vumbiweke onge yi tsimbiwile naswona i ya ntumbuluko.

media.alt: Mabokisi mune lama tsariweke lama vekiweke tanihi phiramidi ya switulu, ma yimela mintlawa ya rixaka leyi vumbiweke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Veka erivaleni goza leri fihliweke: ku avanyisa (ku hlela) ku tibonyene ku ya eka xiyimo xa switulu (ku vekiwa) handle ka vumbhoni byihi na byihi bya ku vekiwa. Blumenbach hi yexe a a nga ri na xiyimo xa switulu ngopfu ku tlula lava a va n'wi tirhisa, kambe valandzeri vakwe va tiyisile mintlawa yakwe - lexi i xikombiso lexinene xa ndlela leyi sayense yi nga hunyetiwaka ku tirhela ku vandlula. [SME] Tiyisisa masiku/vunyiketeri lawa ma kongomeke (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; Blumenbach 1795 edition) hi ku ma pimanisa na xihloko xa SAHO emahlweni ka ku humesa.

slides.title: Racism ya sayense
slides.lead: Ku pima tinhloko (skulls) na mimiri ku 'kombisa' ku vekiwa hi switulu loku a ku bohiwile ka ha ri emahlweni.

blocks.text: Hi va-1800, varacist va tirhise switirhisiwa swo fana na **craniometry** (ku pima vukulu bya nhloko) na **phrenology** (ku hlaya swikuku swa nhloko) ku vula leswaku mintlawa yin'wana yi tlharihile ku tlula leyin'wana. Hi vula leswi **racism ya sayense-mavunwa** hikuva a yi tirhisa *xivumbeko* xa sayense kasi yi honisa ndlela leyinene - valavisisi a va lava vumbhoni byo tiyisisa leswi se a va swi pfumela.

items: Vuxokoxoko (data) byi hlawuriwile, byi hlayiwile hi ku hoxeka kumbe byi vumbiwile ku seketela ku tlakuka ka vaEuropa.
Xigingi (xiyimo xa switulu xa rixaka) xi ehleketiwile emahlweni ka loko 'ndzavisiso' wu sungula.
Yi nyike vuhlonga, ku hlula ka vukoloni na ku hambanisiwa (segregation) xihlambanyo lexi xiximekaka, xa 'sayense'.

media.alt: Nhloko (skull) ekusuhi na switirhisiwa swo pima na rula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kandziyisa xiphiqo xa ndlela, hikuva i mbilu ya mianakanyo: sayense-mavunwa yi hundzuluxa endlelo ra sayense hi ku sungula hi nhlamulo kutani yi lava vuseketeri. Craniometry (xikombiso, minhlengeleto ya tinhloko ya valavisisi vo fana na Samuel Morton) endzhaku yi kombisiwile leswaku yi tele hi ku tlhela na swihoxo. Hlanganisa na vuswikoti bya FET bya ku kambela ku tshembheka ka tihuvo - lava a va ri 'vativi' lava vulawuri bya vona byi tirhisiweke hi ku hoxeka.

slides.eyebrow: Ku tirhisa Darwin hi ku hoxeka - ku sukela hi 1859
slides.title: Social Darwinism
slides.lead: Ku hunyeta thiyori ya ntumbuluko yi va xihlambanyo xa tihanyi ya vanhu.

blocks.text: Buku ya Charles Darwin ya *On the Origin of Species* (1859) yi hlamusela ndlela leyi mixaka ya swiharhi na swimilana yi cincaka ha yona hi ku hlawula ka ntumbuluko. Van'wana - ngopfu-ngopfu **Herbert Spencer**, loyi a vumbeke xiga *survival of the fittest* (ku sala ka lexi tiyeke) - va swi tirhise hi ku hoxeka eka vaaki va vanhu. **Social Darwinism** yi vule leswaku matiko lama fuweke, switulu na 'tirixaka' a swi fuma hikuva a swi tlakukile hi ntumbuluko.

items: Yi kombise ku nga ringani na vusweti onge i swa ntumbuluko naswona swa laveka.
Yi seketele vukoloni: ku hlula a ku vekiwa onge i 'lava tiyeke' va hlula 'lava tsaneke'.
Biology ya Darwin yi hunyetiwile; a nga vulanga leswaku vanhu van'wana va fanele ku fuma van'wana.

media.alt: Xitepisi xa timbanga leti tlakukaka na mukhwana, swi kombisaka leriti ra mavunwa ra nhluvukelo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Va kongoma eka vadyondzi va FET: Social Darwinism i ku tirhisa Darwin hi ku hoxeka, ku nga ri langutelo ra Darwin hi yexe (ntlhamu wo tolovelekaka wa xikambelo). I Spencer, ku nga ri Darwin, loyi a vumbeke 'survival of the fittest'. Ntirho wa nkoka wa mianakanyo a wu ri wa mavonelo (ideology) - wu endle ku aka timfumo letikulu ta Europe na ku nga ringani ka ikhonomi lokukulu ku vonaka onge i swinawu swa ntumbuluko leswi ku nga riki na munhu a nga swi kanetaka kumbe a faneleke ku swi kaneta.

slides.title: Eugenics
slides.lead: Loko vaaki va ri na vuswikoti byo tswala swakudya na tihomu leti antswaka, van'wana va kanetile, ha yini va nga tswali vanhu 'lava antswaka'?

blocks.text: **Eugenics** (ku suka eXigriki hi ku vula 'ku velekiwa kahle') yi thyiwiwe vito hi **Francis Galton**, muzukulu wa Darwin, hi 1883. Yi kongomise ku 'antswisa' ntsengo wa vanhu hi ku khutaza 'lava faneleke' ku va ni vana (*positive* eugenics) na ku sivela 'lava nga faneleke' ku endla tano (*negative* eugenics) - hi ku hambanisa, ku yirisa vukati na ku endla vanhu va nga ha tswali hi ku sindzisa (sterilisation).

items: 'Lava nga faneleke' a va katsa swisiwana, lava khubyekeke, lava vabyaka emianakanyweni na vanhu lava nga riki vabasa.
Yi hundzule racism ya sayense-mavunwa yi va **nongonoko wa xiendlo xa mfumo**.
Ku fika eku sunguleni ka va-1900, eugenics a yi amukeriwile naswona yi xiximiwa eEurope na eUSA.

media.alt: Nsinya wa ndyangu lowu vekiweke laha marhavi man'wana ma funengeteriweke ma tsemiwa, wu fanekisela ku tswala hi ku hlawula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lexi i xitulu xa nhluvukelo: eugenics i laha mianakanyo ya khombo yi hundzukaka mapulani ya xiendlo xa mfumo eka vanhu va ntiyiso. Xiya leswaku eugenics a yi nga ri ku pfumela ka le matlhelo - a yi dyondzisiwa etiyunivhesiti letikulu naswona yi seketeriwa hi vativi va sayense lava xiximekaka, vopolitiki na vachinci-swilo hi matlhelo hinkwawo ya tipolitiki. Ku xiximeka koloko hi kona ku endleke leswaku yi va ni khombo swinene. Kombisa leswaku switulu leswimbirhi leswi landzelaka swi kombisa eugenics yi vekiwa eka nawu.

slides.title: Eugenics eMatikweni yo Hlanganisiwa ya Amerika (USA)
slides.lead: Amerika a ku ri tiko ro sungula ku hundzula eugenics yi va pholisi ya mfumo ya xiyimo xikulu.

blocks.text: Ku sukela hi 1907, swifundzha swa USA swi humese swinawu swa ku **sindzisa ku sterilise** vanhu lava vuriwaka 'va nga faneleke'. Eka nkani wa 1927 wa *Buck v. Bell*, Huvo-nkulu ya Vululami (Supreme Court) yi amukele sterilisation, laha Muavanyisi Oliver Wendell Holmes a tsaleke marito lama tivekaka hi ku biha, 'Switukulwana swinharhu swa swiphukuphuku swa ringana.' Vaamerika va madzana ya magidi va sterilisiwile handle ko pfumela, naswona Nawu wa Vurhurhumeri (Immigration Act) wa 1924 wu tirhise mianakanyo ya eugenics ku susa mintlawa 'leyi nga laviwiki'.

items: Lava khumbekeke a va ri swisiwana, lava khubyekeke na lava humaka eka vaaki lava nga vatsongo hi ku hundzeleta.
Eugenics ya USA a yi nyikiwa mali, yi hleleka naswona yi tsakeriwa emisaveni hinkwayo.
Vativi va sayense ya rixaka va le Germany va dyondze swinawu swa Amerika hi vukheta tanihi xikombiso.

media.alt: Xibava (gavel) lexi vekiweke ehenhla ka tsalwa leri tibiweke hi luphawu ro tshwuka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dyondzo ya nkoka hi leswaku ndlela yo ya eka tihanyi ta vaNazi a yi sunguriwanga eGermany. USA, tiko ra vundzhwalo (democracy), yi sungurile pholisi ya eugenics yo sindzisa, naswona vaendli-swinawu va vaNazi va tshahe swinawu swa Amerika erivaleni loko va tsala swa vona. Khoma xitshaho xa Buck v. Bell hi vukheta - xi vitane tanihi ntiyiso wa matimu wa tingana, ku nga ri ndzhukano wo phindha-phindha handle ko anakanya. [SME] Tiyisisa ntsengo wa lava sterilisiweke (hakanyingi wu tshahiwa wu tlula 60,000 eka lembe-xidzana ra vu-20) na ku vula ka 'nawu wo sungula' wa Indiana wa 1907 hi ku ku pimanisa na huvo ya SAHO emahlweni ka ku humesa.

slides.title: Vukoloni na genocide ya vaHerero na vaNama
slides.lead: eGerman South West Africa (namuntlha i Namibia), mianakanyo ya rixaka yi vumbe leswi votala va swi vitanaka genocide yo sungula ya lembe-xidzana ra vu-20.

blocks.text: Loko vanhu va **vaHerero** na **vaNama** va pfukela ku fumiwa hi vukoloni bya Germany, General **Lothar von Trotha** u humese xileriso xo herisa (1904). Lava poneke a va hlongoleriwa emananga kumbe eminxaxeni ya swihoxo (concentration camps), laha magidi ya vanhu ya feke kona. Tinhloko (skulls) ta lava feke ti rhumeriwile eGermany ku ta tirhisiwa eka ndzavisiso wa 'sayense ya rixaka'.

items: Vativi va matimu va ringanyeta leswaku ku ringana 65,000 wa vaHerero na 10,000 wa vaNama va dlayiwile.
Thiyori ya rixaka yi hundzule ku dlaya vanhu vo tala ku va ku 'susiwa ka ntumbuluko' ka vanhu 'va le hansi'.
Mianakanyo yoleyo ya minxaxa na xiyimo xa switulu xa rixaka yi ta tlhela yi humelela eEurope endzhaku ka makume ya malembe.

media.alt: Vupeladyambu byo nonon'hwa bya mananga na dyambu ra le hansi, byi tsundzuxaka mananga ya Namib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Xitulu lexi xi simeka mianakanyo leyi nga vonakiki eka tihanyi ta xiviri leti nga na nkoka eka xifundzha xa Afrika-Dzonga hi ku kongoma (Namibia a yi fumiwa hi Afrika-Dzonga eka xiphemu-nkulu xa lembe-xidzana ra vu-20). Kandziyisa vuxokoxoko byo chavisa bya tinhloko leti rhumeriweke eka ndzavisiso wa rixaka - byi kombisa leswaku sayense-mavunwa na madzolonga ya vunyingi swa phamela swin'wana na swin'wana. Dokoloka laini leyi kongomeke ya ku ya emahlweni ku ya eNazi Germany handle ko hlanganisa swiendlakalo swimbirhi leswi swi va nchumu wun'we. [SME] Ndlela ya 'genocide yo sungula ya lembe-xidzana ra vu-20' na tinhlayo ta lava feke ti tirhisiwa hi vunyingi kambe ti kanetiwa hi mpimo; tiyisisa hi ku pimanisa na xihloko xa SAHO xa Herero Revolt.

slides.title: Rixaka ra 'vahosi' ra vaNazi
slides.lead: VaNazi va akile mfumo hinkwawo ehenhla ka sayense-mavunwa ya rixaka ra 'vahosi' ra 'Aryan'.

blocks.text: Endzhaku ka 1933, Nazi Germany yi endle xiyimo xa switulu xa rixaka xi va xisekelo xa nawu. Va vumbe rixaka ra vahosi ra **Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) kutani va hlamusela vaYuda, vaRoma, vanhu vantima na van'wana tanihi 'valala' va le hansi. **Swinawu swa Nuremberg (1935)** swi tekele vaYuda vuaki-tiko (citizenship) naswona swi yirise vukati exikarhi ka vaYuda na vaGerman van'wana - swi hundzula racism ya sayense-mavunwa yi va sisiteme ya nawu yo hambanisa.

items: Nawu wa 1933 wu pfumelele ku sterilise hi ku sindzisa 'lava nga faneleke hi nkoka wa nsindzana', wu landzelela eugenics ya USA.
Vukanganyisi (propaganda), swikolo na sayense hinkwaswo a swi dyondzisa ku vekiwa hi switulu ka rixaka onge i ntiyiso.
Ku hambanisiwa ku kule goza hi goza: ku suka eka vuaki-tiko, ku ya eka nhundzu, ku ya eka vutomi hi byoxe.

media.alt: Tsalwa ra ximfumo leri tibiweke kutani ri handzuriweke hi mbirhi, ri fanekisela vuaki-tiko lebyi susiweke hi nawu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kombisa vadyondzi endlelo leri nhloko-mhaka ya CAPS yi lavaka va ri twisisa: mianakanyo ya rixaka yi va 'xiphemu-nkulu xa pholisi ya mfumo na swinawu'. Swinawu swa Nuremberg i xikombiso lexi twalaka ngopfu - nawu lowu hlamuselaka leswaku i mani loyi a hlayiwaka tanihi munhu hi ku helela. Kombisa laini yo kongoma leyi humaka eka xitulu xo sungula xa eugenics ya USA: nawu wa sterilisation wa Germany wa 1933 wu vumbiwe hi xiphemu hi ku landzelela swinawu swa Amerika. Kandziyisa ndlela ya ku engetela-engetela ya nxaniso - a wu sunguranga hi ku dlaya, wu sungule hi maphepha.

slides.title: Holocaust
slides.lead: Mianakanyo ya rixaka yi gimetile hi ku dlaya vanhu va timiliyoni hi ndlela leyi hleleke, ya xifekitheri.

blocks.text: Hi nkarhi wa Nyimpi ya Vumbirhi ya Misava hinkwayo, mfumo wa vaNazi wu endle **Holocaust** - ku dlaya loku bohiweke, loku hleleke ka vaYuda va kwalomu ka **timiliyoni ta tsevu**, swin'we na vaRoma, vanhu lava khubyekeke, valala va tipolitiki na van'wana lava vuriwaka 'va nga faneriki vutomi'. Leyi a ku ri makumu yo chavisa ya lembe-xidzana ra mianakanyo ya rixaka leyi a yi veke vanhu hi switulu kutani yi endla hi ku ya hi ku vekiwa koloko.

items: Lava khubyekeke a va ri exikarhi ka lava khumbekeke vo sungula, hi nongonoko wo sungula wa 'euthanasia' (ku dlaya lava vabyaka).
Vululamisi (bureaucracy), sayense na thekinoloji swi tirhisiwile eku dlayeni hi xiyimo xa xifekitheri.
Holocaust yi yima tanihi xitsundzuxo lexikulu swinene xa laha mianakanyo ya rixaka yi nga yisaka kona.

media.alt: Kerhese yin'we leyi pfurhaka eka ndhawu ya munyama, luphawu ro tsundzuka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lexi i xitulu lexi twelaka ngopfu - xi khome hi ku tika na vukheta. Hlayisa ku kongoma eka ndzoho wa vumunhu na eka ku tsundzuka, ku nga ri eka vuxokoxoko byo chavisa. Endla mhaka ya nxopaxopo leswaku Holocaust a yi nga ri vuhava byo hatlisa kambe i makumu yo kongoma ya mianakanyo leyi vadyondzi va yi landzeleleke eka dyondzo hinkwayo: ku avanyisa, xiyimo xa switulu, ku susa vumunhu, ku hambanisa, kutani ku herisa. Xiya nkongomiso wa dyondziso wa SAHO hi Holocaust naswona hlanganisa na timfanelo ta vumunhu leti humeleleke endzhaku (Universal Declaration of Human Rights ya 1948 na rito 'genocide').

slides.title: Mianakanyo ya rixaka na Afrika-Dzonga
slides.lead: Mikhuva yoleyo ya ku anakanya hi rixaka yi vumbe ku hambanisiwa na apartheid laha kaya.

blocks.text: Afrika-Dzonga a yi ri xiphemu xa ntsheketo lowu wa misava hinkwayo. Mimfumo ya vukoloni na ya vatshami-vantshwa yi tirhise mianakanyo yoleyo ya sayense-mavunwa ku seketela ku hlula, ku tekiwa ka misava na ku hambanisiwa. Endzhaku ka 1948, **apartheid** yi akile sisiteme hinkwayo ya nawu ehenhla ka ku avanyisa hi rixaka - ngopfu-ngopfu hi **Nawu wa Ku Tsarisa Vaaki (Population Registration Act) wa 1950**, lowu a wu hlela munhu un'wana ni un'wana eka 'rixaka' ra ximfumo.

items: Vativi va matimu hakanyingi va pimanisa swinawu swo sungula swa apartheid na swinawu swa rixaka swa vaNazi.
Eka hatimbirhi, mfumo, ku nga ri biology, wu bohile leswaku i mani loyi a nga wa 'rixaka' rihi.
Ku twisisa sayense ya mavunwa ya rixaka swi pfuna ku hlamusela leswaku ha yini apartheid a yi nga lulamanga ku sukela emitini.

media.alt: Buku ya vuxaki (ID) leyi tibiweke hi ntlawa, yi landzelela ku avanyisa hi rixaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kombisa nkoka wa nhloko-mhaka eka vadyondzi va Afrika-Dzonga: mianakanyo leyi dyondziweke laha a yi nga ri xiphiqo xa Europe ntsena, yi tirhisiwile ku aka ku hambanisiwa na apartheid laha kaya. Endla xipimaniso xa vukheta na Nazi Germany (hatimbirhi ti tirhise ku avanyisa ka mfumo) kasi u xiya ku hambana - apartheid a yi kongomise eka ku tirhisiwa loku lawuriwaka na ku hambanisa ku ri na ku herisa. Leswi swi hlanganisa ku ya emahlweni eka tiyuniti ta apartheid ta Giredi 11 na 12.

slides.title: Ku suka eka ku avanyisa ku ya eka khombo

blocks.alt: Nkarhi-laini wa ku hluvuka ka mianakanyo ya rixaka ku sukela hi 1735 ku fika hi 1950.

events.label: Darwin u kandziyisa On the Origin of Species
Genocide ya vaHerero na vaNama yi sungula
Buck v. Bell wa USA wu amukela sterilisation yo sindzisa
Swinawu swa ku avanyisa swa apartheid eAfrika-Dzonga

slides.notes: Tirhisa nkarhi-laini ku hlanganisa mhaka tanihi ntsayi wa xivangelo na vuyelo: mianakanyo (ku avanyisa) yi tiya yi va sayense-mavunwa (Social Darwinism, eugenics), leyi tsariwaka eka nawu (USA, Nazi Germany, Afrika-Dzonga) kutani yi endliwa madzolonga (genocide ya vukoloni, Holocaust). Kombela vadyondzi ku kombeta leswaku hi swihi swiendlakalo leswi nga 'mianakanyo', leswi nga 'swinawu' na leswi nga 'madzolonga' - u tiyisa xivumbeko-nkulu xa nhloko-mhaka emahlweni ka swivutiso swa ku kambela.

slides.title: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke
slides.lead: Mianakanyo yi na matimba: sayense ya mavunwa ya rixaka, loko se yi pfumeriwile naswona yi endliwe nawu, yi tekile vutomi bya madzana ya timiliyoni.

blocks.text: Eka dyondzo leyi hinkwayo hi landzelele ndlela leyi 'rixaka' ri **vumbiweke, ku nga kumekanga**; ndlela leyi sayense-mavunwa (Social Darwinism na eugenics) yi nyikeke racism xifihla-xikandza lexi xiximekaka; na ndlela leyi, loko mimfumo yi tsale mianakanyo leyi yi va **nawu**, vuyelo byi sukeke eka sterilisation yo sindzisa ku fika eka genocide ya vukoloni na Holocaust. Ku dyondza matimu lawa i xitsundzuxo hi khombo ra mianakanyo yo susa vumunhu - naswona i ku sirhelela timfanelo ta vumunhu na xindzhuti xa vumunhu.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Hlamusela leswaku ha yini vativi va matimu va hlamusela sayense ya rixaka ya lembe-xidzana ra vu-19 tanihi 'sayense-mavunwa'. Kombeta ndlela leyi swigingi swi fikeleriweke ha yona.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Mianakanyo ya rixaka yi ve ni khombo hakunene ntsena loko mimfumo yi yi hundzula yi va nawu.' Xana wa pfumelelana? Tirhisa swikombiso swimbirhi ku ya ehenhla swi humaka eka dyondzo leyi ku seketela nhlamulo ya wena.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Pimanisa ndlela leyi rixaka ri tirhisiweke ha yona eNazi Germany na eAfrika-Dzonga ya apartheid. Kombeta ku fana kun'we na ku hambana kun'we.

slides.notes: Gimeta hi ku tlhelela eka mhaka yo sungula - rixaka i xivumbeko xa vaaki lexi nga na vuyelo bya ntiyiso byo onha ngopfu - naswona hi ku tiyisa ku angula ka timfanelo ta vumunhu loku landzeleke 1945. Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi xikambelo xo tsariwa kumbe mbulavurisano lowu hleleke; ku averiwa ka timaki ku landzela mafambiselo ya CAPS ya ku tsala ko andzisa na ku pimanisa tihuvo (Q2 i xiphemu-xitsongo/xitsalwa; Q3 yi tolovela vuswikoti bya ku pimanisa lebyi nhloko-mhaka yi byi lavaka). Tsundzuxa vadyondzi leswaku nhloko-mhaka leyi yi seketela tiyuniti ta apartheid na ta timfanelo ta vumunhu leti landzelaka.
